baseline.tsconfig: strict: false, noImplicitAny: false, strictNullChecks: false

topErrors.description: Conversion of type X to type Y may be a mistake
Type instantiation is excessively deep and possibly infinite
Type X is not assignable to type Y
Property X does not exist on type Y
Property X does not exist on type Y. Did you mean Z?
Argument of type X is not assignable to parameter of type Y

budget.rule: New code in Phase 6+ must not increase errorCount above baseline
